description: The Camera Frustum Mesh is a component that can be used in a Mesh Renderer to visualize the limits and view cone of a Camera

fields.Near: Slices the mesh to demonstrate camera nearclip
fields.Far: Expands the mesh to demonstrate camera farclip.
fields.HorizontalAngle: The horizontal FOV of the camera represented by this mesh.
fields.VerticalAngle: The Vertical FOV of the camera represented by this mesh.
fields.DualSided: Enables the mesh to be dual sided.
fields.NearCap: Whether or not the end closest to the camera should be capped with a quad.
fields.FarCap: Whether or not the end furthest from the camera should be capped with a quad.

usage: The CameraFrustumMesh is used alongside the InteractiveCamera to visualize the range of the camera.
